reasoning: The question asks if Zhu Jiner's Elo rating on Wikipedia will increase by at least 1% (approx. 26 points) between March 15 and March 22, 2026. The FIDE rankings Wikipedia page is based on the official FIDE rating lists, which are only published on the 1st of each month. Thus, the Wikipedia page will display the March 1st rating on both March 15 and March 22 (which is confirmed to be 2578), meaning a 0% change. Furthermore, a 26-point jump in 7 days is practically impossible at her level, making any live rating hypothesis equally impossible.
